task_completion.description: Create a continuous side corridor, three private sleeper suites with enclosed bathrooms, and a rear observation lounge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan shows walls dividing the 25m x 3.5m shell into a long continuous side corridor, three main suite rooms, three smaller bathroom rooms inside or attached to the suites, and a larger lounge area at one end.

task_completion.description: Install at least 6 doors connecting the corridor to suites, and suites to bathrooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 6 door models/symbols are visible in the 2D plan or 3D view: 3 connecting the corridor to the suites, and 3 connecting the suites to their respective bathrooms.

task_completion.description: Furnish each of the three suites with a bed or sleeper-sofa and storage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, each of the three suite rooms contains at least one bed or sleeper-sofa and at least one storage item (e.g., wardrobe, dresser, or cabinet).

task_completion.description: Furnish each of the three bathrooms with a toilet and a sink.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, each of the three enclosed bathroom rooms contains a toilet and a sink.

task_completion.description: Furnish the lounge with at least four seating items and a bar or table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, the rear observation lounge contains at least four seating items (chairs, sofas, or stools) and at least one table or bar.

task_completion.description: Document the corridor walking clearance with at least two dimension lines and save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D plan displays at least two dimension lines measuring the width of the side corridor. The Sweet Home 3D window title should not show an unsaved asterisk (*), or a save dialog/action is visible in the final screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical interface to build the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the layout visible in the 2D plan and 3D view, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying XML/SH3D files directly.

integrity.description: The agent actively used the application's tools to draw walls, place furniture, and add dimensions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the furniture catalog being browsed, wall/dimension tools selected in the toolbar, or items actively being dragged onto the 2D plan.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct starter file shell.
integrity.visual_evidence: The project window title shows 'train_carriage_starter.sh3d' and the outer dimensions of the layout match the provided 25m x 3.5m rectangular shell.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required starter file is 'train_carriage_starter.sh3d', which provides an empty 2500x350 cm train carriage shell. The total points for this task are 100, with a pass threshold of 70.
